sentences.english: There is a small store at the corner of my street.
sentences.korean: 우리 길 모퉁이에 작은 가게가 있어요.

sentences.english: The owner is an old man named Mr.
He knows everyone in the neighborhood.
I go there to buy milk and bread for my mom.
sentences.korean: 엄마 심부름으로 우유와 빵을 사러 가요.

sentences.english: He always gives me a free candy when I visit.
sentences.korean: 갈 때마다 항상 사탕을 하나 주세요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
